LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GP TODCO A (CA) DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 15, 2013. THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS INDICATES THAT A LATE OPPOSITION WAS FILED ON AUGUST 8, 2013. PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B, THE PLAINTIFF SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION WITH THE COURT WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. DEFENDANT HAS LEAVE TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BY SEPTEMBER 16, 2013. MR. PA WAIVED NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. RULING: NO APPEARANCE BY PETITIONER. Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: YU- HWA PA, PETITIONER IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GP TODCO A (CA) DBA TODCO DEVELOPMENT CORP'S Demurrer IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. THE COMPLAINT IS UNCERTAIN UNDER CCP SECTION 430.10(F). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
*AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY THE PREVAILING PARTY.*

Demurrer
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Continued To Oct-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - YU-HWA PA, TEL. NO. 334-7511, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. CHARLES J. PHILLIPPS, TEL. NO. 927-9449 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GP TODCO A (CA) Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to October 15, 2013. The register of actions indicates that a late opposition was filed on August 8, 2013. Pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B, the plaintiff shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with the court with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Defendant has leave to file a supplemental reply by September 16, 2013. Mr. Pa waived notice of the new hearing date. Judge: Leslie Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/LN
